# Kryil Infotech Pvt Ltd - AI, Cloud & Software Development Solutions

## About Us
Kryil Infotech transforms visionary ideas into technological results. We design and build solutions that are reliable, future-proof, and crafted to scale—so businesses can focus on growth, not friction.

## Core Services

### Software Development
- Custom Software Development
- AI & Machine Learning Solutions
- Mobile App Development (iOS & Android)
- Web Application Development
- Full Stack Development

### Cloud Infrastructure
- Cloud Migration (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- Cloud Architecture & Management
- Hybrid Cloud Solutions
- Multi-Cloud Strategy
- DevOps Automation

### Cybersecurity
- Security Audits & Penetration Testing
- Threat Detection & Response
- Vulnerability Assessment
- Compliance Services (ISO 27001, SOC 2)
- Security Operations Center

### Digital Marketing
- SEO & PPC Marketing
- Social Media Marketing
- Content Marketing
- Email Marketing
- E-commerce Marketing

### Automation & IoT
- Business Process Automation
- RPA (Robotic Process Automation)
- IoT Solutions
- Edge Computing
- Workflow Automation

## Technology Stack
- Programming: Python, JavaScript, Java, Node.js, React, .NET
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud Platform
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- AI/ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch, NLP, Computer Vision
- Security: SIEM, IDS/IPS, Encryption
